androidAudioProcessingDesc: Use hardware audio processing. May affect output quality.
autoCheckUpdateDesc: Automatically check for new versions on app launch
autoConfigDesc: Automatically select optimal audio settings based on connection mode
autoStartDesc: Start streaming automatically on app launch
blackHoleConfigHint: BlackHole installed, please configure in System Settings
blackHoleFallback: BlackHole not found, falling back to default device
blackHoleInstalled: BlackHole is installed, please configure in System Settings
blackHoleNotFound: Cannot find BlackHole virtual input device
blackHoleNotInstalled: Please install BlackHole virtual audio driver manually
blackHoleTrying: macOS: Trying to use BlackHole virtual device
closeConfirmMessage: What would you like to do when closing the application?
contributorsDesc: Thanks to everyone who contributed to this project.
deletePluginConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "%s"?
enableHazeEffectDesc: Add frosted glass blur effect to cards
firewallMessage:
Port %d is not allowed by Windows Firewall. This may prevent Android devices from connecting via Wi-Fi.

Would you like to try adding a firewall rule for this port? (Requires Administrator privileges)
firstLaunchGotItButton: I know how to use it
firstLaunchMessage: You seem to be using MicYou for the first time. This app turns your Android device into a high-quality microphone for your computer via Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or USB.
floatingWindowDesc: Show a small always-on-top window with audio visualization
introText: MicYou is an open source microphone tool that turns your Android device into a high-quality microphone for your computer. Based on AndroidMic, it supports Wi-Fi (TCP), Bluetooth, and USB connections, providing low-latency audio transmission.
keepScreenOnDesc: Prevent the screen from turning off while using the app
nsAlgorithmRNNoiseDesc: Deep learning-based noise reduction algorithm with the best results. Intelligently identifies and eliminates various background noises while maintaining voice clarity. Suitable for most scenarios.
nsAlgorithmSpeexdspDesc: Traditional digital signal processing algorithm, lightweight and requires no additional models. Basic noise reduction effect, suitable for low-performance devices or latency-sensitive scenarios.
nsAlgorithmUlnasDesc: ONNX Runtime-based noise reduction model providing good noise reduction effects. Better than RNNoise in some cases, but may not work on some devices or systems.
oledPureBlackDesc: Use a pure black background in dark mode
pluginPlatformWarning: Plugin "%s" is designed for %s platform and may not work correctly on your current device.
pluginSyncWarningMessage: The following cross-platform plugins are not installed on both devices:
updateMessage: A new version (%s) is available on GitHub. Would you like to update now?
useDynamicColorDesc: Use system accent color for app theme
useSystemTitleBarDesc: Use native system window decorations instead of custom title bar
mirrorCdkDesc: Use MirrorChyan mirror for faster update downloads
mirrorDownloadDesc: Use MirrorChyan mirror for faster downloads
mirrorCdkGetLink: No CDK? Get one from MirrorChyan
vbcableNeedsAdmin: Administrator privileges required, please run the application as administrator

errors.errorNetworkTimeoutMessage: Connection timed out. Please check your network connection and target device status.
errors.errorNetworkUnreachableMessage: Cannot reach IP address: %s. Please verify the IP address and ensure both devices are on the same network.
errors.errorPortInUseMessage: Port %d is already in use by another application. Please choose a different port or close the conflicting application.
errors.errorConnectionRefusedMessage: Connection was refused. The target device may not be running MicYou or is not listening on the specified port.
errors.errorConnectionRefusedWifiMessage: Connection to %s was refused. Please ensure the desktop server is running and configured with the same port.
errors.errorFirewallBlockedMessage: Port %d is blocked by Windows Firewall. Please add a firewall rule or run the application as administrator.
errors.errorPermissionDeniedMessage: Insufficient permissions to perform this operation. Please run the application as administrator.
errors.errorAdminPrivilegeMessage: This operation requires administrator privileges. Please restart the application as administrator.
errors.errorDeviceNotFoundMessage: The specified Bluetooth device was not found. Please ensure the device is paired and Bluetooth is enabled.
errors.errorBluetoothDisabledMessage: Bluetooth is disabled on this device. Please enable Bluetooth in system settings.
errors.errorUsbConnectionFailedMessage: USB connection failed. Please check your USB cable and ensure USB debugging is enabled on your Android device.
errors.errorAdbCommandFailedMessage: ADB command execution failed. Please ensure ADB is installed and USB debugging is enabled.
errors.errorHandshakeFailedMessage: Handshake failed with the target device. This may indicate a version mismatch or protocol error.
errors.errorProtocolErrorMessage: A protocol error occurred during communication. Please restart both applications.
errors.errorVersionMismatchMessage: Version mismatch detected. Please ensure both devices are running the same version of MicYou.
errors.errorAudioDeviceMessage: Audio device error. Please check your audio device settings and restart the application.
errors.errorAudioFormatMessage: Unsupported audio format. Please try different audio settings or use auto-configuration.
errors.errorSuggestionCheckNetwork: • Check your Wi-Fi or network connection
errors.errorSuggestionCheckTargetRunning: • Ensure the target device is running MicYou server
errors.errorSuggestionTryDifferentPort: • Try using a different port number
errors.errorSuggestionChangePort: • Change the port number in settings
errors.errorSuggestionCheckOtherApps: • Check if other applications are using this port
errors.errorSuggestionCheckServerRunning: • Verify the desktop server is running and ready
errors.errorSuggestionCheckWifiConnected: • Ensure both devices are connected to the same Wi-Fi network
errors.errorSuggestionCheckAntivirus: • Check antivirus or security software settings
errors.errorSuggestionEnableUsbDebugging: • Enable USB debugging in Android developer options
errors.errorSuggestionCheckAdbInstalled: • Ensure ADB is installed on your computer
errors.errorSuggestionVersionMatch: • Ensure both devices use the same MicYou version
errors.errorSuggestionCheckAudioDevice: • Check audio device permissions and availability
errors.errorSuggestionCheckLogs: • Check application logs for detailed error information

usb.usbModeDialogMessage: USB connection requires ADB port forwarding. Please run the following command on your PC:
usb.usbModeDialogNote: Note: Make sure USB debugging is enabled on your Android device and ADB is installed on your PC.
usb.usbNotConnectedError: USB device not connected. Please connect your Android device via USB cable.
usb.usbAdbNotInstalledError: ADB is not installed or not found in PATH. Please install Android SDK Platform Tools.
usb.usbPortForwardingFailed: ADB port forwarding failed. Please check if USB debugging is enabled.
usb.usbConnectionTimeout: USB connection timeout. Please verify the ADB command was executed successfully.
usb.usbPermissionDenied: USB debugging permission denied. Please accept the debugging request on your Android device.
